title: Ecospherical Expansion
description: Overhauled generation to the biomes of the Overworld.
body:
Ecospherical Expansion is a mod aimed towards recreating biomes with more diversity and aesthetically pleasing scenes. Additionally, this mod adds custom integration with the Large Biomes and Amplified world presets; While also adding 8 new world presets to choose from.

NEWER VERSIONS (1.21+): 
This mod will not be updated anymore, it has been replaced by my newer mod https://modrinth.com/mod/hydrological

![Taiga](https://i.imgur.com/Dhpewas.jpeg)

NOTE: Versions below 1.20.x do not have world presets. In those versions, this mod simply redoes the vanilla biomes. 

Default: 
- Terrain above the surface is the same as vanilla.
- Caves are now much more open.
- Oceans now lead into sprawling cave systems.

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/BY2cSsn.


Large Biomes: 
- Adds some massive plateaus with smooth surfaces.
- Biomes are much larger.

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/auPn7VT.


Amplified: 
- Biome generation has been altered to make Y63 and below always oceans.
- World height has been extended to Y512.
- Terrain has been reworked to add massive variation in style across large distances.
- There are now small floating islands that generate above the existing terrain.

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/4aeR1cD.


Tropospherical: 
- Sparse floating islands. 
- The bottom of the world is entirely submerged in ocean.
- The nether is also transformed in the same way.

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/JzkNeLS.

Nether Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/v3Ijoke.


Stratospherical: 
- Large, multi-layered, dense floating islands.
- The bottom of the world is an empty void.
- The nether is also transformed in the same way.

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/wDZNxVJ.

Nether Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/O3838aP.


OG Stratospherical: 
- Ridiculously dense floating islands.
- Insane amounts of verticality.
- Does not have the floating island rivers. (To stay consistent with the OG mod.)
- The nether is not affected. (To stay consistent with the OG mod.)

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/7zMgTwJ


Mesospherical: 
- A large, single layer of moderately spaced floating islands. 
- The bottom of the world is an empty void. 
- The nether is also transformed in the same way.

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/Gp6saJK.

Nether Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/Xb8Ugg8.


Thermospherical: 
- Two layers of sparse floating islands. 
- Floating islands are made to be more vertically variant. 
- The bottom of the world is an empty void. 
- The nether is also transformed in the same way.

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/6O1Rizi.

Nether Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/kI9Jtfk.


Lithospherical: 
- Spawn on a 3x2x3 platform of oak logs with a single torch.
- One massive cave system comprises the entire world. 
- World height has been lowered to Y128. 
- The nether is also transformed to have a similar appearance, but the height remains the same.

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/KT2BnTb.

Nether Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/RB6bI7c.

Asthenospherical: 
- Spawn on a 3x2x3 platform of oak logs with a single torch.
- The top of the dimension is one massive ceiling. 
- One layer of small, but dense, floating islands. 
- World height has been lowered to Y128. 
- The nether is also transformed in the same way.

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/0YlJ6pm.

Nether Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/4E5IyMs.

Exospherical: 
- Multiple layers of floating islands.
- Floating islands have pointy bottoms. 
- The bottom of the world is an empty void.
- The nether is also transformed in the same way.

Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/PCzlRHP

Nether Screenshots: https://imgur.com/gallery/PCzlRHP


Community-taken screenshots of each preset can be found in the gallery on this page.

There is also a datapack version of this mod that can be used even in vanilla servers, found here: https://modrinth.com/datapack/ecospherical-expansion-lite. Note: It is missing some features due to the limitations of a datapack.

Compatibility: 
- Biospherical Expansion: Fully compatible. 
- Terralith: Incompatible. 
- Biomes O' Plenty: Fully compatible.
- Tectonic: Fully compatible on older tectonic versions, requires datapack which is available to download [in the discord. ](https://discord.com/channels/935235865704280154/1162801256952246292/1162802136162242561)

Attention Server Owners: 
To use custom presets you must replace "level-type=minecraft\:normal" with "level-type=eco\:thenameoftheworldpreset" in your server properties file.

Discord: https://discord.gg/HHqKa8vTAN
This mod may be used in any modpack.
